parameters.content:
## Trigger and SLA Sync
Runs every 15 minutes and calls backend SLA batch sync before alert fan-out.

## Alert Fan-out
For each SLA-risk ticket, send Email notifications and a best-effort Microsoft Teams alert.

parameters.subject: =[ITSM][SLA] {{$json.id || $json.ticket_id || 'Ticket'}} {{$json.sla_status || 'at_risk'}}
parameters.message: =SLA alert for ticket {{$json.id || $json.ticket_id || 'N/A'}}: "{{$json.title || 'N/A'}}" is currently in status "{{$json.status || 'N/A'}}" with priority "{{$json.priority || 'N/A'}}" and SLA state "{{$json.sla_status || 'N/A'}}". Remaining SLA time is {{$json.sla_remaining_human || ($json.sla_remaining_minutes !== undefined ? ($json.sla_remaining_minutes + ' minute(s)') : ($json.sla_due_at ? ('until ' + $json.sla_due_at) : 'N/A'))}}. Assigned owner: {{$json.assignee || 'Unassigned'}}. Context summary: {{$json.description || $json.summary || $json.body || 'N/A'}}. Source: n8n SLA Breach Alerting workflow.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const ticketId = $json.id || $json.ticket_id || 'N/A'; const priority = String($json.priority || 'Normal').trim(); const slaState = String($json.sla_status || 'unknown').trim(); const title = $json.title || 'Untitled ticket'; const status = $json.status || 'N/A'; const assignee = $json.assignee || 'Unassigned'; const ticketUrl = $json.ticket_url || (($env.FRONTEND_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:3000') + '/tickets/' + ticketId); const severity = slaState === 'breached' || priority.toLowerCase() === 'critical' ? 'Critical' : 'High'; const themeColor = severity === 'Critical' ? 'C62828' : 'EF6C00'; const slaInfo = $json.sla_remaining_human || ($json.sla_remaining_minutes !== undefined ? ($json.sla_remaining_minutes + ' minute(s)') : ($json.sla_due_at ? ('until ' + $json.sla_due_at) : 'Not available')); return { '@type': 'MessageCard', '@context': 'https://schema.org/extensions', summary: `ITSM SLA alert - ${ticketId}`, themeColor, title: `${severity} SLA ${slaState === 'breached' ? 'Breach' : 'Risk'} Ticket`, sections: [{ activityTitle: `${ticketId} - ${title}`, text: `[Open ticket](${ticketUrl})`, facts: [{ name: 'Ticket', value: ticketId }, { name: 'Status', value: status }, { name: 'Priority', value: priority || 'N/A' }, { name: 'Assignee', value: assignee }, { name: 'SLA State', value: slaState || 'unknown' }, { name: 'SLA Info', value: slaInfo }], markdown: true }], potentialAction: [{ '@type': 'OpenUri', 'name': 'Open Ticket', targets: [{ os: 'default', uri: ticketUrl }] }] }; })() }}

parameters.content:
## Error Handling
Any failed backend/notification node is routed to this logger branch.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const ticketId = $json.id || $json.ticket_id || 'N/A'; const slaState = String($json.sla_status || 'at_risk').trim(); const severity = slaState === 'breached' ? 'critical' : 'warning'; const eventType = slaState === 'breached' ? 'sla_breached' : 'sla_at_risk'; const title = 'SLA ' + (slaState === 'breached' ? 'Breach' : 'Risk') + ' : ' + ticketId; const body = ($json.title || ('Ticket ' + ticketId)) + ' — SLA ' + slaState + ', priority ' + ($json.priority || 'N/A') + ', assigned to ' + ($json.assignee || 'N/A'); return { title, body, severity, event_type: eventType, user_id: null, source: 'n8n_workflow', link: '/tickets/' + ticketId, dedupe_key: 'sla_' + slaState + '_' + ticketId + '_' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 13) }; })() }}
